meaning: n 浏览器,吃嫩叶的动物,浏览书本的人
examples: You need an up-to-date Web browser.
On the phone browser, you can save to this queue in the cloud.
You don't need to restart the browser after installing an extension.
Flash cookies are not managed by the same browser settings as are used for browser cookies.
Featured applications include: S Note, Internet Browser, Video Player, Email, Gallery and Polaris Office.
